payload.description:
## Goal
Run a second performance pass on CLI accuracy evaluations after initial async item-lookup fix.

## Scope
- Identify next dominant bottleneck in per-item scoring path
- Implement safe optimization to improve throughput
- Validate with targeted local checks and summarize expected impact

## Definition of Done
- One concrete bottleneck fixed
- Code compiles/tests for touched area pass
- Results recorded in Kanbus comments
payload.title: Second-pass optimization for CLI accuracy evaluation throughput
